case_title: ALI KAMAREI VS. NUTMEG INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JOHN V. MEJIA, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-15-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-30-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: PATTY LEE HUBBLE, CSR# 3058. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
